name: Nana/History
intro: The Moon Elves were not the only race to call the Enchanted Forest their home. A race of Cat-like Elves, the Leonins, also lived in these forests. Cute, friendly and uninvolved in the conflicts of the world, they are the loyal preservers of the Enchanted Forest who make the area the fairyland paradise that it is. As one of the the most ancient race of the Enchanted Forest, They possess a strong natural talent for all things magical.
